text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 16. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading scientific papers late tonight. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
